fields.formulaExpression:
case 
	when Capacity_code__c >= 1 and Coverage_5G_P__c >2
    Then 'Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift inntil 400 MB'
    ELSE
    case
	when Capacity_code__c >= 1 and Coverage_4GP40__c >2
    Then 'Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift inntil 60 MB'
    ELSE
    case
	when Capacity_code__c >= 1 and Coverage_4G_Plus__c >2
    Then 'Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift inntil 40 MB'
    else
    case
   	when Capacity_code__c >= 1 and Coverage_4G__c >2
    Then 'Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift inntil 20 MB'
	else
	'Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift ikke tilgjengelig'
    end
    end
 end
  end

fields.formulaExpression:
case when
mobile_service_segment__c ='IoT' 
then 'IOT' 
when
(mobile_service_segment__c ='Central Government' or mobile_service_segment__c ='Governmental Security' or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Health' or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Municipality Central' or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Municipality East' or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Municipality North' or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Municipality South' 
or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Municipality West'
or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Business Critical'
or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Municipality Region'
or
mobile_service_segment__c ='State'
) 
then 'Public'
when
mobile_service_segment__c ='Public Unassigned' 
then 'Public Unassigned'
when
(mobile_service_segment__c ='Mobile XL' 
or 
mobile_service_segment__c ='Ent 2 Farmer' 
or 
mobile_service_segment__c ='Ent 2 Hunter')
then 'XL'
when
(mobile_service_segment__c ='Hunter L'
or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Mobile L'
or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Ent 1 Farmer'
or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Ent 1 Hunter')
then 'L'
when
(mobile_service_segment__c ='Hunter M' or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Mobile M'
or
mobile_service_segment__c ='MM M Farmer'
or
mobile_service_segment__c ='MM M Hunter'
)
then 'M'
when
(mobile_service_segment__c ='Hunter S' or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Mobile S' or
mobile_service_segment__c ='Mobile XS'
or
mobile_service_segment__c ='MM S Farmer'
or
mobile_service_segment__c ='MM S Hunter'
)
then 'S'
when
(mobile_service_segment__c='MM TSP' and NumberOfEmployees<=25)
then 'S'
when 
(mobile_service_segment__c='MM TSP' and NumberOfEmployees>=26)
then 'M'
else ''
end
fields.label: Gruppe Mobile Service Segment
fields.name: Gruppe_mobil_service_segment
